flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Brockport rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.3k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY Brockport fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (47.6% → 41.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Brockport fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at SUNY Brockport fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.6k → $15.8k).
